description: GoDaddy provides domain registration, DNS, certificates, auctions, reseller, and related internet infrastructure services. It also offers an Agent Name Service (ANS) registry for verified AI agents.
summary: GoDaddy exposes authenticated HTTP developer APIs at https://api.godaddy.com plus a public MCP server at https://api.godaddy.com/v1/domains/mcp; no GraphQL or CLI surface was found.
